error_signature: AI Agent only uses the first ID from set node
title: AI Agent not iterating over multiple IDs correctly
symptom: The AI Agent node processes multiple emails but only uses the first ID from the set node for all iterations, causing mixed information.
applies_when: Multiple emails trigger the workflow simultaneously
not_this_if: Only one email is processed at a time
The agent node is correctly placed inside a loop
root_cause: The AI Agent node was not placed inside a loop, causing it to reference the first item repeatedly instead of iterating over each email's corresponding ID from the set node.
fix_steps: Place the AI Agent node inside a loop that iterates over the incoming emails
Ensure that the loop correctly references the IDs from the set node for each iteration
agent_instruction: Reorganize the workflow to place the AI Agent node inside a loop for proper ID referencing.
